GAME_LOOP_DESCRIPTION: Game loop blocks for rendering shapes and handling collisions.
GAME_LOOP_CONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create a game loop that renders its scene to the selected display.
GAME_LOOP_ADD_SHAPE_TOOLTIP: Add a shape to the game loop scene.
GAME_LOOP_ON_TICK_TOOLTIP: Run code every game-loop tick. The delta variable contains elapsed milliseconds since the previous tick.
GAME_LOOP_ON_COLLISION_TOOLTIP: Run code when the selected shapes intersect. The block attaches default colliders to both shapes.
GAME_LOOP_CLEAR_TOOLTIP: Clear the scene and remove all event listeners from the game loop.
GAME_LOOP_OFF_TICK_TOOLTIP: Remove the tick callback from the game loop.
GAME_LOOP_OFF_COLLISION_MESSAGE0: remove collision handler for $[SHAPE_A] and $[SHAPE_B] from $[GAME_LOOP_INSTANCE]
GAME_LOOP_OFF_COLLISION_TOOLTIP: Remove the collision callback for the selected pair of shapes.
